productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Sunshine Red Clothing Set
description: Style Note If your little angel's mantra in life is to talk, talk, talk, and talk some more, this t-shirt and skirt set from little miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little chatterboxes, this set is all she needs to tell the world that a little talkative magpie is in their midst! Team it with comfy footwear Product Details Red printed sleeveless round neck t-shirt, has graphic print and crystal embellishments on the front and red piping at the neckline and armholesRed skirt that has a broad elasticated waistband, bow on the left side of the waistband and gathered with graphic print on the right Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean
